content:
Yday night she didn't sleep again and was constantly talking to herself.

The doctor said when she does this, give her extra Abilify and Remeron; I gave her, but still, the whole night she couldn't sleep. Then, at 6 AM this morning, she got a little aggressive and started saying really bad things about Krishang, my 14-year-old nephew. Also got Aviana, our daughter, in the conversation. And said I am leaving with Avi to India.

At that point in time, I gave her 2 tablets of Zyprexa, and since then, she has been a little calmer. Then at 10 am she took her morning medication.

She was trying to do some house chores, but I told her to rest either in the backyard or in the bedroom. She walked for more than 30 / 40 mins, and after my meeting, I finally told her pls go and sleep. I have put her to sleep, but let's see.
